title: i asked God for flowers and He gave me rain… and for a while, i didn’...
description: i asked God for flowers and He gave me rain… and for a while, i didn’t understand. i wanted beauty, but He gave me storms. i wanted something to hold, something already bloomed but He gave me something to grow through. the rain felt heavy. the days felt long. i questioned if He even heard me. but now standing in a garden i didn’t even realize i was planting, i see it clearly. every drop had purpose. every storm was shaping me. every delay was digging my roots deeper. see, God didn’t ignore me… He loved me too much to give me petals without process. the rain wasn’t punishment it was preparation. it taught me patience. it softened my heart. it watered the seeds i couldn’t see. and now, the flowers are here… not just around me, but within me. sometimes, the most beautiful answers come disguised in the hardest seasons. if you’re reading this still & so if you’re in the rain don’t run. it might just be the beginning of your becoming. trust the rain. it’s watering your miracle. #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #healingjourney #vulnerability #encouragement #motivation #growthmindset #empowerment #discipline  #creatorsearchinsights
fulltitle: i asked God for flowers and He gave me rain… and for a while, i didn’...
